permissions.description: To join video calls or send voice messages, we need access to your camera and microphone.

camError.title: Camera access error
camError.description: We need camera permission to send video messages or place video calls.

micError.title: Your microphone is disabled
micError.description: We need microphone permission to send voice messages or place calls.

cam.title: Camera access
cam.description: We need camera access to send video messages and place video calls.

mic.title: Microphone access
mic.description: We need microphone access to send voice messages and place video calls.

screenError.title: Screen access error
screenError.description: Screen capture permission was denied. We need screen access permission to share your screen.

screen.title: Screen access
screen.description: After tapping confirm, please select the screen or tab you want to share.
